user.title: Connect to Access Control Panel
user.description: Enter the IP address and port of your Access Control Panel device.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Access Control Panel
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for your device.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device.

send_code.name: Send Code
send_code.description: Sends an access code to the keypad.

add_user.name: Add User
add_user.description: Adds a new user to the access control system.

remove_user.name: Remove User
remove_user.description: Removes a user from the access control system.

grant_division.name: Grant Division
grant_division.description: Grants a user access to a division.

revoke_division.name: Revoke Division
revoke_division.description: Revokes a user's access to a division.
